description: Style NoteThe Spanish influences in the design details of this sandal is the reason for the Spanish name, senorita. Subtle pastel hues, super soft footbed styling and classic designs with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble!Product DescriptionWhite sandal with colourful midfoot straps, toe holder and a strap connecting toe holder to the midfoot straps  Smooth footbedTextured TPU outsole with an upraised heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
